business_goal: Reduce friction and mismatch risk during order picking and confirmation.
current_manual_flow: Open the picking or task app
Review the next item or order line
Confirm the result in the app
Switch to another app or message if something is wrong
Rebuild context later if follow-up is needed
pain_points: repeated confirmation steps across awkward app screens
mismatch between physical reality and app state
too much retyping when escalating a missing or wrong item
workers lose time bouncing between picking and escalation tools
success_criteria: more dependable evidence when something is wrong
support_posture: Always preserve mismatch summary, visible task state, and escalation-ready evidence.
